name: 16oz 6pk Glass Shoreham Goblets - Threshold™: Traditional Lead-Free Drinking Glasses, Dishwasher-Safe, Cold Beverages
description: Give your glassware an elegant and stylish upgrade with 6-Pack of 16-Ounce Glass Shoreham Goblets from Threshold™. These streamlined and classic goblets are great for special occasions where you'll be entertaining guests, or simply for daily use. The set includes six glasses with a 16-ounce capacity so you have plenty of room to serve your favorite drinks. Plus, the dishwasher-safe design means easy and worry-free cleanup.
